story.text: # 🌐 The Atlas — the Spellweb Knowledge Graph

The graph that ties the whole federation together: **788 nodes** and **1703 edges** from `spellweb/src/data`. Every node is a forkable page; every edge is a live wikilink. Where a node is a persona, skill, or cast that already lives on a sibling site, it links there. A sibling of the [agentprivacy guide](https://guide.agentprivacy.ai/view/welcome-visitors).

## Node types (788)

- 💡 [[Concept Nodes]] (196)
- 📖 [[Act Nodes]] (180)
- 📓 [[Term Nodes]] (98)
- 🛠️ [[Skill Nodes]] (87)
- 📄 [[Document Nodes]] (52)
- 🎭 [[Persona Nodes]] (42)
- 🎭 [[Cast Nodes]] (38)
- 🔷 [[Vertex Nodes]] (22)
- 🏛️ [[Workshop Nodes]] (21)
- 🚪 [[Gateway Nodes]] (20)
- ✨ [[Spell Nodes]] (19)
- 🧮 [[Theorem Nodes]] (8)
- 🗝️ [[Key Nodes]] (2)
- 🗺️ [[Geography Nodes]] (1)
- 🏙️ [[Civic Nodes]] (1)
- • [[Artefact Nodes]] (1)

## Prose canon

- 📜 [[The Open Canon]] (14) — the blockchain-canon chapters.
- ⚔️ [[The Blades]] (4) — the blade narratives + ceremony prose.

---
*1703 edges · cross-site refs resolved: 258 · source of truth: `spellweb/src/data` · (⚔️⊥⿻⊥🧙)😊*
